signals.title: State Puppet Theatre Weekend Performances
signals.reason: Perfect morning activity with short, highly engaging puppet shows tailored specifically for toddlers, and located right in town.
signals.note: State Puppet Theatre is a verified venue in Plovdiv with weekend shows suitable for young children.

signals.title: PhillGood Festival 2026
signals.reason: An massive open-air music festival on a flat, spacious site. While loud, children under 11 enter for free and a daytime walk with ear protection could be a fun option for music-loving parents.
signals.note: The Rowing Canal is a real venue in Plovdiv; the music festival is a verified public event.

signals.title: Eco Park Stamboliyski
signals.reason: Explicitly loved by the family; features a secure, fenced toddler playground filled with wooden structures and sensory elements.
signals.note: Eco Park Stamboliyski is a verified family-friendly location within a 30-minute drive of Plovdiv.

signals.title: Damascena Biopark
signals.reason: A beautiful rose distillery gardens that function as an eco-park, with safe paths to see free-roaming deer, swans, and ostriches.
signals.note: Damascena Biopark is a real, family-relevant attraction in Skobelevo within the 90-minute radius.

signals.title: Batak Reservoir & Tsigov Chark
signals.location: Tsigov Chark (~60 min drive from Plovdiv)
signals.reason: A wonderful destination to escape the high July temperatures of Plovdiv, offering wide grassy areas, gentle pedal boats, and horses to spot.
signals.note: Batak Reservoir and Tsigov Chark are real, accessible family destinations within a 60-minute drive.
